plan.failureSummary: The deterministic run failed during a cached click step because it attempted to interact with a 'Select your occupation' dropdown that does not exist in the current UI. The current UI displays 'Age Group' radio buttons instead.
observedIndicators: Deterministic replay mode used cached selectors for 'Select your occupation' dropdown
Failure screenshot shows 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of the expected dropdown
The overall objective is highly flexible, meaning the agent can adapt to dynamic form changes once the cache is cleared

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page.AI cache and retry the automation
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page.AI cache for this test and re-run. This forces the autonomous agent to generate fresh actions tailored to the current form layout ('Age Group' radio buttons) rather than relying on stale cached selectors.

plan.notes: The page dynamically varies its survey questions (as expected in 'unstable-survey'). Re-running with a cleared Page.AI cache will allow the autonomous agent to dynamically adapt to the currently displayed fields and complete the survey successfully.
